title: Tissue preparation and immunohistochemistry-Alcacer et al 2024
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6m7od","text":"This protocol describes the tissue preparation and immunohistochemistry protocol to verify the extent of dopamine denervation from 6-OHDA injections and check the transfection efficiency of GCamp6f-GFP vial construct that was injected into mouse brains. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"2sjup","text":"Twenty minutes prior the mouse is given an intraperitoneal injection of vehicle (physiological saline) or L-DOPA (6 mg/kg). The mouse is then rapidly anesthetized with pentobarbital (500 mg/kg intraperitoneal injection). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8qc0b","text":"-Perfusion pump","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2e44j","text":"-4% (w/v) paraformaldehyde in phosphate buffered saline (PBS), pH 7.4","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62alk","text":"-Storage solution: 30% (w/v) ethylene glycol, 30% (w/v) glycerol, and 0.1 M PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fuolq","text":"-Tris-buffered saline (TBS; 0.10 M Tris and 0.14 M NaCl, pH 7.4)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdhd4","text":"-GFP Polyclonal Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488, Invitrogen (Molecular Probes) Cat#A-21311)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6eoar","text":"-Rabbit polyclonal α TH antibody Rabbit anti-TH: Peel Freez Biological, Product code: P40101-150","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4vvuv","text":"-Alexa Fluor 594 goat anti-rabbit, Jackson ImmunoResearch Labs Cat#111-585-045","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8nbvj","text":"-Polyvinyl alcohol mounting medium (PVA-DABCO, Sigma Aldrich)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7r8oh","text":"-Zeiss Axio Imager M2 fluorescence microscope (for imaging final slices)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Stabilize mouse and open the abdomenal cavity of the anesthetized mouse and expose the heart.

Using forceps, stabilize the heart and insert a blunted needle into the left ventricle. The needle is connected to tubing for the perfusion pump that contains 4% (w/v) paraformaldehyde in saline phosphate buffer (PBS), pH 7.4.
Make a small incision on the right atrium using fine scissors.
Start the perfusion pump with PFA and perfuse until liquid is clear and not bloody (for a total of 5 min infusing 100mL per minute).
Post-fix the brain overnight in 4% (w/v) paraformaldehyde in saline phosphate buffer (PBS), pH 7.4 and store at 4 °C
Once perfusion is complete, dissect out the brain.
Cut brains at 30um sections with a vibratome and store at -20 °C in 30% (v/v) ethylene glycol, 30% (v/v) glycerol, and 0.1 M sodium phosphate buffer until sections are processed.
Rinse free floating sections in Tris-buffered saline (TBS; 0.10 M Tris and 0.14 M NaCl, pH 7.4).
Incubate for 5 minutes in TBS containing 3% H2O2 and 10% methanol.
Rinse in TBS (0.10 M Tris and 0.14 M NaCl, pH 7.4).
Incubate for 15 minutes in TBS containing 0.2% Triton X-100.
Incubate overnight at 4 °C with 1:1000, GFP Polyclonal Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488 and 1:1000 rabbit polyclonal α TH antibody.
Block sections in bovine serum solution (BSA).
Rinse in TBS (0.10 M Tris and 0.14 M NaCl, pH 7.4).
Incubate for 45 minutes with 1:400 secondary antibody goat-anti rabbit Alexa Fluor 594 at room temperature.
Rinse twice in TBS (0.10 M Tris and 0.14 M NaCl, pH 7.4).
Mount sections in a polyvinyl alcohol mounting medium.
Use Zeiss Axio Imager M2 fluorescence microscope to confirm lens placement, viral transduction and dopaminergic denervation.
Rinse twice in TB (0.10 M Tris, pH 7.4).
creator: Christine Weber-Schmidt
